Items.Title: Arias strike sends Colombia past Ghana and into World Cup last 16
Items.Description: Colombia reached the last 16 of the World Cup for the third time in their last three appearances at the tournament with a 1-0 win over Ghana.

Items.Title: Arias strike sends Colombia into last 16 with victory over Ghana
Items.Description: Jhon Arias scores the only goal of the game as Colombia become the last team to book their place in the last 16 following a 1-0 win over Ghana in Kansas City.

Items.Title: Who is Clement Turpin? The World Cup referee in charge of Colombia vs Ghana
Items.Description: The referee for Colombia vs Ghana is Clement Turpin, a respected and experience official from France

Items.Title: Selección Colombia
Items.Description:
📸 ¡𝗡𝗢𝗖𝗛𝗘 𝗗𝗘 𝗖𝗟𝗔𝗦𝗜𝗙𝗜𝗖𝗔𝗖𝗜𝗢́𝗡! 😬💯

𝑬𝒍 𝒔𝒖𝒆𝒏̃𝒐 𝒅𝒆 𝒆𝒔𝒕𝒆 𝑬𝑸𝑼𝑰𝑷𝑶 𝒄𝒐𝒏𝒕𝒊𝒏𝒖́𝒂 ¡𝑺𝒆𝒈𝒖𝒊𝒎𝒐𝒔, 𝑪𝒐𝒍𝒐𝒎𝒃𝒊𝒂! 🇨🇴🫂

🇨🇴 1-0 🇬🇭
⚽ Jhon Arias 

🔜 𝟴𝘃𝗼𝘀 🏆
